purpose: Validate a bounded public Lean/Lake proof witness: a tiny synthetic Lake project compiles with the installed local toolchain while receipts redact proof bodies and negative cases preserve the authority ceiling.

private_state_exclusion_rules.proof_bodies: public synthetic Lean source is allowed; JSON manifests and receipts must not embed proof bodies
private_state_exclusion_rules.mathlib_imports: forbidden until a later Mathlib-specific authority ceiling exists
private_state_exclusion_rules.provider_payload_bodies: forbidden; this organ runs local Lean/Lake only
private_state_exclusion_rules.build_artifacts: temporary Lake build output stays outside tracked source

authority_ceiling: bounded public Lean/Lake witness only; not Mathlib authority, provider authority, release operations, benchmark performance, or theorem-program authority beyond the declared toy fixture
anti_claim: This fixture manifest accepts only a tiny public Lean/Lake witness compiled in a temporary workspace. It does not authorize Mathlib, provider calls, private proofs, public release, hosted deployment, publication operations, recipient work, or secret export.
